# Gradient Trail

A local MVP for DEM-first national park trail planning.

Canonical domain: https://gradienttrail.com
Sitemap: https://gradienttrail.com/sitemap.xml
RSS feed: https://gradienttrail.com/feed.xml

Key pages:
- /us-trails/trails
- /us-trails/parks
- /us-trails/calculator
- /us-trails/compare
- /blog/
- /us-trails/methodology

Method: route-relation geometry, DEM elevation profile, deterministic gentleness/family/difficulty scores, conservative access language.
